The '''Skirmish over Saleucami''' occurred when the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], set out to collect the bounty on captured [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] scout party led by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] over [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]].

==Prelude==
Shortly after the [[Evacuation of Yavin]], the Rebel Alliance recovered a [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] that was made by [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] in case the rebels were to ever lose their base on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. The holocron contained locations for possible new bases for the Alliance. Admiral Ackbar led a scouting party to [[the Graveyard]] world of [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]], one of the locations listed on the holocron. After concluding that Boz Pity would make an ideal spot for a new base, Ackbar took a [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]] along with a small detachment of the scouting party but never made it.

==The Battle==
Somehowm the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] Boba Fett had learned that Ackbar was traveling to Saleucami, who set up an ambush for them. When the transport jumped in-system, the [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']] attacked the transport from behind and disabled its [[Sublight engine/Legends|engines]]. The bounty hunter then boarded the transport and captured the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] admiral along with all the surviving crew and [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. It is unknown what happened to the transport although it is possible that it was destroyed or left to drift.
[[File:Boba_Fett_HS_Fathead.png|thumb|293x293px|Commander Boba Fett]]

==Aftermath==
Fett sold Ackbar to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], but kept the rest of crew and droids. Fett traveled to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and sold the men as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] to the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]]. Ackbar would later be rescued by [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]] in the [[Battle of Kessel (0 ABY)|Battle of Kessel]] and the rebel prisoners would be set free in a [[Mission to Mos Eisley (Galactic Civil War)|Mission to Mos Eisley]].
